arts.ttl: Arsenal or Chelsea? €175m superstar makes transfer decision
arts.sum: AC Milan winger Rafael Leao is not looking to leave the Serie A club this summer, according to Italian media. However, Leao is not looking to leave Milan this summer despite the frequent criticism of him this season.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti risks wrath of Real Madrid fans as full-back pairing to face Arsenal revealed
arts.sum: The two Real Madrid stars set to fill the full-back positions for the club’s upcoming showdown with Arsenal have this afternoon been unveiled online. Real, of course, are primed to…

arts.ttl: Bryan Mbeumo Arsenal transfer fear as star could miss 10 games after controversial FIFA decision
arts.sum: The international competition is scheduled to take place in late December 2025 and run deep into January next year having been delayed due to the inaugural edition of FIFA’s controversial expanded Club World Cup taking place in the United States in June and July. Arsenal could return for Mbuemo, a player with a proven Premier League pedigree, in the upcoming window but there is a potential stumbling block which may get in the way.

arts.ttl: 'La Remontada' explained as Real Madrid plot Arsenal Champions League comeback
arts.sum: In English, 'La Remontada' translates to 'The Comeback.' It is no surprise that this is the word of choice echoing around the Madrid camp, as they'll need to produce an impressive comeback to overturn a 3-0 deficit they suffered at the Emirates against Arsenal in their first-leg Champions League quarter-final. In Madrid's Champions League history, they have only ever come back from a 3-0 deficit once.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo's hattrick heroics, bizarre Bernabeu events and Sergio Ramos' era defining strike - Real Madrid's best Champions League comebacks as Arsenal look to avoid second-leg fightback
arts.sum: Real Madrid's ability to completely defy all the odds and consistently turn teams over in the dying moments is why Arsenal still have their work cut out on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make €60m bid for Real Madrid bench-warmer
arts.sum: Arda Guler plans to leave Real Madrid this summer and Man Utd are prepared to pay €60m for the underused wonderkid. Guler had the world at his feet when he burst onto the scene at Fenerbahce, but he has rarely been allowed to show off his talents since joining Madrid in the summer of 2023.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive Rodrygo transfer approval from Real Madrid legend despite Mohamed Salah contract extension
arts.sum: Liverpool are told that Real Madrid attacker Rodrygo would be an ideal fit for the Premier League amid reports linking the Brazilian with a switch to Anfield.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid consider shock managerial appointment after Carlo Ancelotti ultimatum
arts.sum: Real Madrid are considering a surprise move to appoint former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp as Carlo Ancelotti's future hangs in the balance.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal most valuable combined XI revealed
arts.sum: “The most used word in the dressing room in the last days is Remontada”. The message from Jude Bellingham and his Real Madrid teammates has been clear in the build-up to their...

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea battle for 'the next Victor Osimhen'
arts.sum: Tapsoba has been widely compared to Nigeria superstar Victor Osimhen following his breakthrough at the tournament, and he is reportedly being monitored by a host of top clubs ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window. Arsenal and Chelsea were reportedly among the clubs scouting Burkina Faso youngster Asharaf Loukman Tapsoba at the U17 Africa Cup of Nations.
